w:r.w:t: Healthcare, Manufacturing, Financial Services, Retail, Technology, Education, Legal, Government
Salesforce AppExchange | Managed Package | All Industries
Initial design document — Healthcare domain only
Added Manufacturing and Financial Services domains
Enterprise Universal Edition — all 8 domains, 13 platform features, Agentforce & Data Cloud integration

This End-to-End Design Document describes the full technical and functional architecture of the KT Onboarding Enterprise Universal Product — a Salesforce-native, AppExchange-certified managed package that delivers domain-agnostic onboarding automation across 8 industry verticals and 7 persona types.

The document covers all 13 base platform features (B1–B13) introduced in Section 5 of the Enterprise Design Specification (v1.0, March 2026). For each feature, this document provides business context, functional specification, Salesforce technical design, data model, integration architecture, security considerations, and platform-specific implementation notes leveraging the latest Salesforce innovations including Agentforce, Data Cloud, and Flow/OmniStudio.
Feature introduced in Enterprise Universal Edition v2.0
Lightning Web Component — Salesforce front-end framework
Domain Intelligence Engine — metadata-driven configuration core
KT Onboarding Enterprise transforms Salesforce into the definitive enterprise onboarding platform — eliminating fragmented HR tools, compliance gaps, and manual processes across every industry.

By embedding onboarding intelligence natively within Salesforce CRM and leveraging Agentforce AI, organizations achieve faster time-to-productivity, full regulatory compliance, and measurable cost reduction per onboardee.

The KT Onboarding Enterprise Universal Product is a Salesforce-native managed package available on AppExchange, designed to replace fragmented, industry-specific onboarding solutions with a single, metadata-driven platform. By leveraging the full breadth of the Salesforce platform — including Agentforce, Data Cloud, Flow/OmniStudio, Experience Cloud, CRM Analytics, and Named Credentials — KT Onboarding delivers intelligent, compliant, and personalized onboarding experiences at enterprise scale.
Universal Domain Coverage: One platform for Healthcare, Manufacturing, Financial Services, Retail, Technology, Education, Legal, and Government with zero custom code required per domain.
AI-First Onboarding: Agentforce-powered agents automate document collection, compliance verification, task assignment, and onboardee guidance — reducing HR workload by up to 65%.
Enterprise Compliance: Pre-built regulatory frameworks (HIPAA, OSHA, SOX, GDPR, FDA 21 CFR Part 11, ISO 9001, ISO 45001) ensure onboarding is audit-ready from day one.

Salesforce-Native Advantage: No data leaves the Salesforce org; all onboarding data, documents, tasks, and compliance records are stored and governed within Salesforce — preserving existing security models, audit trails, and reporting.
Time-to-Onboard Reduction: Organizations report 40–70% reduction in time-to-onboard through automated workflows, AI-assisted document processing, and parallel task execution.
AppExchange Distribution: Fully packaged for AppExchange with LMA-based licensing, version-controlled metadata, and upgrade-safe configuration.
Onboarding AI agents, HR copilot, compliance gap detection
Unified onboardee profiles, HRIS data ingestion, identity resolution
Journey orchestration, guided forms, API integrations
Journey Builder, Smart Forms, Analytics dashboards
Real-time dashboards, bottleneck analysis, CSAT trending
DOCX/PDF generation, e-signature, OCR ingestion, document vault
Managed package, subscription billing, upgrade management

KT Onboarding Enterprise is designed as a domain-agnostic platform. The Domain Intelligence Engine (B1) auto-configures every onboarding journey, checklist, compliance ruleset, and document template based on the selected industry domain. The following eight domains are supported out-of-the-box in v2.0:
Clinical credential verification, HIPAA consent, mandatory training, patient safety protocols
Safety induction, OSHA compliance, equipment certification, shift scheduling
Background screening, AML/KYC checks, FINRA registration, securities licensing
POS training, loss prevention, seasonal onboarding at scale, multi-location setup
Security clearance, tool provisioning, code of conduct, IP agreements, access setup
DBS/background checks, safeguarding training, course enrollment, accreditation
Bar admission, conflict of interest disclosure, matter conflict checks, client intake
Security clearance, vetting, oath of office, ethics training, IT provisioning

Each persona type maps to a specialized onboarding journey template, configured automatically by the Domain Intelligence Engine based on domain selection and persona. Personas can be combined (e.g., a Contractor in Healthcare) to create composite journeys.
Payroll setup, benefits enrollment, employment contract, right-to-work
SOW, IR35/1099, limited system access, no benefits, shorter journey
Vendor questionnaire, insurance COI, banking details, procurement approval
Patient intake or healthcare client onboarding
HIPAA consent, insurance verification, medical history, care plan
Welcome kit, product training, CSM assignment, SLA agreement
Academic verification, course enrollment, safeguarding, fee setup
Channel partner or franchise operator onboarding
Franchise agreement, territory setup, brand training, POS provisioning

KT Onboarding Enterprise is 100% Salesforce-native. All components reside within the Salesforce org as part of a managed package, eliminating external infrastructure dependencies and ensuring data residency compliance. The architecture leverages the latest Salesforce platform innovations released in 2025–2026.
Journey Builder UI, Smart Forms, Dashboards, Admin Console
Agentforce Platform, Einstein Studio, Prompt Builder
AI Onboarding Agents, HR Copilot, intelligent task routing
Unified onboardee profiles, real-time HRIS sync, identity resolution
Journey orchestration, compliance triggers, approval workflows
Document generation, OCR processing, background check orchestration
Named Credentials, REST/SOAP, MuleSoft, Platform Events
HRIS, payroll, background check, ID verification, e-signature
Onboardee records, journey state, compliance tracking, audit logs
Shield, Field Audit Trail, Event Monitoring, Permission Sets
Data governance, PII encryption, access control, compliance audit
Time-to-onboard, bottleneck analysis, CSAT, compliance heatmaps
Onboardee self-service portal — no Salesforce license required
Managed package distribution, per-seat billing, upgrades

Agentforce (released Salesforce Winter 25 / Spring 25) provides low-code AI agent creation powered by the Atlas Reasoning Engine. KT Onboarding deploys three purpose-built Agentforce agents to automate onboarding operations.
Answer onboarding status questions, surface compliance gaps, draft offer letters and welcome emails using Prompt Templates, escalate blockers to managers
Guide onboardees through checklist completion, answer FAQs, collect missing documents, remind about incomplete tasks via WhatsApp/SMS/Slack
Scan onboarding records for regulatory gaps, auto-assign remediation tasks, generate compliance reports, flag expiring certifications
Agent Definition: Created in Salesforce Setup > Agentforce Studio. Each agent has a system prompt, topic scope (e.g., "New Employee Onboarding"), and action library.
Actions: Custom Apex-backed actions (InvocableMethod) for querying onboarding records, triggering document generation, and posting Slack/Teams notifications.
Prompt Templates: Grounded on onboardee records and journey data via Einstein Merge Fields and Data Cloud data graphs.
Channel Deployment: KT HR Copilot embedded in Salesforce Home page, Service Console, and mobile app. KT Onboardee Guide embedded in the Experience Cloud portal.
Guardrails: Topic restrictions limit agents to onboarding-specific actions. Einstein Trust Layer ensures PII masking in LLM prompts and maintains audit logs of all AI interactions.
☁️ Salesforce Data Cloud — Unified Onboardee Intelligence

Data Cloud serves as the central data unification layer for KT Onboarding. HRIS data (Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, BambooHR) streams into Data Cloud via pre-built connectors, creating a unified onboardee profile that drives intelligent personalization and real-time journey progression.
Data Cloud Architecture for KT Onboarding
HRIS (Workday, SAP, BambooHR), background check APIs, ID verification APIs, existing Salesforce CRM data
KT_Onboardee_Profile__dll — resolves identity across HR system, Salesforce Contact, and external systems
Matches by email, employee ID, government ID hash — deduplicates across systems
Onboarding completion score, compliance risk score, time-to-onboard prediction (Einstein Discovery)
Activates onboardee segments to trigger Salesforce Flow journeys (e.g., "Onboardees 3 days from Day 1 with incomplete tasks")
Platform Events published to Data Cloud on task completion, document upload, compliance check result
Configurable per domain — GDPR Right to Erasure supported via Data Cloud purge rules

All orchestration logic in KT Onboarding is declarative-first, built on Salesforce Flow and OmniStudio. This ensures upgrade safety, admin configurability, and no-code customization for customer orgs.
Multi-stage journey with parallel/sequential steps, SLA tracking, escalation
Auto-assign compliance tasks on domain/role selection, flag expired certs
HRIS sync, background check API, ID verification API calls
Multi-step conditional forms for onboardees and HR admins
Trigger DOCX/PDF generation, merge fields, e-signature dispatch
Manager approval for contractor onboarding, vendor approval chains
Map HRIS field schemas to KT Onboarding data model

The Domain Intelligence Engine is the cornerstone differentiator of KT Onboarding Enterprise. It is a metadata-driven configuration framework that auto-generates onboarding workflows, document checklists, task sequences, and compliance rules based on the selected industry domain and persona type — eliminating the need for custom development for each customer's industry.

Every KT Onboarding deployment starts with two configuration choices: (1) Industry Domain and (2) Persona Type. The DIE reads these selections and instantiates a complete, pre-configured onboarding experience — ready to use in minutes, not months.
Supports 8 industry domains out-of-the-box, extensible to unlimited custom domains.
Domain templates are version-controlled and delivered via managed package upgrades.
AI-enhanced: Agentforce uses DIE metadata to ground its recommendations in domain context.
Data Cloud feeds real-time signals back to the DIE to adapt journey configurations based on onboardee behavior.
All domain configurations are stored as Custom Metadata Types (CMTs) — making them deployable via Metadata API, manageable in Setup, and upgrade-safe in the managed package.
HR admin selects Industry Domain and Persona Type when creating a new Onboarding Record.
Apex trigger (KT_DIE_Trigger) fires on KT_Onboarding__c insert and calls KT_DomainIntelligenceEngine.cls.
The engine queries all relevant CMTs for the domain/persona combination.
It invokes KT_JourneyBuilderService.cls to instantiate journey stages, tasks, and document checklists as child records.
It invokes KT_ComplianceEngine.cls to evaluate applicable regulatory frameworks and create compliance task records.
Platform Events (KT_Journey_Instantiated__e) are published — triggering Data Cloud streaming ingestion and Agentforce context loading.

Customers can create custom domains (e.g., "Mining", "Hospitality") by creating new Custom Metadata records in Setup. The DIE automatically processes custom domains using the same engine — no code changes required. Custom domain templates can be imported/exported via the Metadata API for cross-org sharing.
KT_Onboarding__c — Master onboarding record per onboardee
Einstein Copilot grounding via KT_Onboarding__c and related objects
KT_Onboardee_Profile__dll updated on each domain configuration event
Custom Metadata Types are read-only in subscriber orgs (managed package protection).
Domain/persona selection is controlled via Permission Sets — only HR Admins can set domain; managers can view.
Field-level security on KT_Onboarding__c ensures sensitive fields (salary grade, clearance level) are restricted by profile.
Agentforce prompt templates are governed by Einstein Trust Layer — no raw PII passes to the LLM.

The Onboarding Journey Builder is a drag-and-drop visual workflow designer that enables HR teams to create, customize, and manage end-to-end onboarding journeys without writing code. Built entirely as a Salesforce-native LWC application, it orchestrates every aspect of the onboarding lifecycle from pre-boarding through 90-day milestones.
Visual canvas with drag-and-drop stage and task configuration.
Multi-stage workflow: Pre-Onboarding → Day 1 → Week 1 → 30 / 60 / 90-Day Checkpoints.
Conditional branching — different paths based on persona, domain, location, or assessment result.
Parallel and sequential task execution with dependency management.
SLA enforcement with configurable escalation rules and automated notifications.
Re-usable sub-flow components that snap into any journey template.

The visual canvas is implemented as a custom LWC using the Lightning Diagramming Framework. Journey stages and tasks are represented as wire-connected nodes rendered using SVG canvas elements within LWC. The builder state is serialized to a JSON configuration stored on the KT_Journey_Template__c custom object.
SVG canvas, node drag/drop, connection drawing, toolbar
Individual stage card with settings panel
Configure branch conditions using formula-style editor
Set SLA days, escalation targets, notification templates
Save/load/validate journey JSON, resolve sub-flow dependencies
Runtime journey instantiation from template at onboarding creation
At runtime, journey execution is powered by Salesforce Flow Orchestration (Orchestrator). When a new onboarding record is created:
KT_JourneyOrchestrator.cls reads the journey template JSON and creates a Flow Orchestration instance.
Each stage maps to a Flow Orchestration Stage with assigned steps (tasks).
Parallel stages run as concurrent orchestration steps — each with its own completion criteria.
SLA tracking uses Salesforce Entitlements (re-purposed) or custom KT_SLA__c tracking objects with scheduled Apex for escalation.
On stage completion, a Platform Event triggers the next stage activation and updates the Data Cloud onboardee profile.
Document collection, background check, IT request, system access setup
Welcome pack, equipment collection, badge activation, manager intro
Safety induction, mandatory training, team introductions, tool setup
Performance check-in, feedback survey, goal setting, training progress
Probation completion, final assessment, benefits finalization, archive
Stores the journey design JSON, domain/persona applicability, version number
Runtime stage instances — status, actual vs planned dates, owner
Individual task records — assignee, SLA, status, dependency chain, sub-flow reference
Reusable sub-flow components — referenced across multiple journey templates

The Smart Form Builder provides HR teams and system administrators with a no-code, drag-and-drop form creation tool supporting over 40 field types. Forms are context-aware, pre-populated with Salesforce data, conditionally dynamic, and available in 50+ languages — enabling personalized data collection without developer involvement.
40+ field types including signature, document upload, address lookup, NPI/license number, date range, and rating scale.
Conditional logic — show/hide fields based on prior answers (e.g., show "Visa Type" only if "Non-Citizen" selected).
Pre-populate fields from Salesforce records (Contact, Account, KT_Onboarding__c) to reduce rekeying.
50+ language support with right-to-left (RTL) rendering for Arabic, Hebrew, and Urdu.
Mobile-first responsive design — fully accessible on iOS, Android, and desktop browsers.
Native e-signature collection without third-party dependencies (KT Sign).
Save-and-resume — onboardees can save progress and return from any device.
Form versioning with full audit trail — know exactly which version a form was completed on.
Progress indicator — step-by-step completion bar with estimated time remaining.
Drag-and-drop canvas, field palette, conditional logic editor, preview mode
Runtime form rendering with conditional logic evaluation, save-and-resume state
Translation management UI — CSV import/export for 50+ locales
Stores form schema as JSON — field definitions, conditions, layout, version
Stores submitted form data — encrypted, linked to KT_Onboarding__c
Per-locale label/helptext translations for each form field
Merge Salesforce data into form pre-fill, validate submissions, trigger downstream flows
Capture canvas-based e-signature, timestamp, IP, device fingerprint

For guided, wizard-style forms (e.g., the new employee intake form), KT Onboarding leverages OmniScript for step-by-step rendering with built-in branching and data transformation. DataRaptor Load actions write form data to Salesforce objects, while Integration Procedures submit to external APIs (e.g., payroll system enrollment).

Conditional rules are stored as a JSON rule tree within KT_FormDefinition__c.Condition_Rules__c. At runtime, the ktFormRenderer LWC evaluates each rule client-side using a JavaScript rule engine, providing instant show/hide responses without server round-trips. Complex server-side validation is performed via Apex wire adapters on critical field transitions.
KT Sign is the native electronic signature capability bundled with the Professional tier and above, eliminating the need for third-party add-ons for basic e-signature use cases.
Canvas-based signature pad (touch and stylus supported) rendered within the Smart Form.
Signature is stored with timestamp (UTC), IP address, device user agent, and geolocation (if permitted).
Signature image stored as Salesforce ContentVersion (encrypted at rest via Shield Platform Encryption).
KT_Signature_Audit__c record created for each signature event — immutable once created.
Sequential or parallel signing supported via the Document Management module (B4).

KT Onboarding's Document Management and Contract Lifecycle Management (CLM) module provides an end-to-end document workflow — from template-based generation through multi-party e-signature, document vault storage, and OCR-powered ingestion. With 200+ pre-built templates and bulk processing capability for 1,000+ simultaneous onboardees, this module eliminates paper-based document processes entirely.
200+ pre-built DOCX/PDF document templates across all 8 domains.
Dynamic document generation with Salesforce data merge (Apex-powered DOCX/PDF generation).
Multi-party e-signature with signing order, delegation, and expiry management.
Dedicated document vault per onboardee — all documents versioned and access-controlled.
OCR-powered document ingestion — scan a passport or qualification certificate and extract structured data automatically.
Bulk send capability — dispatch documents to 1,000+ onboardees simultaneously via batch Apex.
Core generation service — merges Salesforce data into DOCX/PDF templates using server-side rendering library
Stores template binary (ContentVersion), merge field mappings, domain/persona applicability
Real-time template preview with merge field substitution before generation
Asynchronous bulk generation for 1,000+ onboardees — uses Queueable chaining for governor limit management
Submits uploaded document images to OCR API, parses structured data, populates onboarding fields
Index of all documents per onboardee — links to ContentDocument, tracks version, status, expiry
Manages multi-party signing order, sends signing invitations, tracks completion, handles delegation and expiry
The OCR pipeline processes uploaded identity documents, qualification certificates, and compliance documents:
Onboardee uploads document via the onboardee portal (B7) or HR uploads via the Salesforce app.
KT_OcrIngestionService.cls is triggered via a Platform Event (KT_Document_Uploaded__e).
The document image is submitted to the configured OCR partner API (e.g., AWS Textract or Azure Form Recognizer via Named Credentials).
Returned structured JSON is mapped to KT Onboarding fields via configurable field mappings stored in KT_OCR_FieldMapping__mdt.
Extracted data is presented to the HR admin for review and one-click acceptance before being written to the onboarding record.
Agentforce KT HR Copilot reviews OCR results and flags discrepancies against existing record data.
Document generated with merge data and presented for review
HR configures signing order, signer roles, and expiry date
Signing invitation sent via email with secure signing link
Signer accesses link, reviews document, applies KT Sign or DocuSign signature
If signer is unavailable, system allows delegation to authorized alternate
Unsigned documents trigger escalation after configured expiry period
Fully signed document stored in ContentDocument vault, KT_DocumentVault__c updated

The Identity and Credential Verification module provides a comprehensive identity proofing and credential validation capability within Salesforce, orchestrating multiple verification services through a unified API abstraction layer. This module is critical for regulated industries and remote-first organizations where physical identity verification is not feasible.
Government ID verification: Passport, Driver's License, National ID — supported across 195+ countries via partner APIs (Onfido, Jumio, Persona).
Biometric liveness check for remote identity proofing — prevents spoofing with photo or video replays.
Right-to-work verification for UK (share code), US (I-9 E-Verify), EU, and Australia.
Professional license verification — medical, legal, financial, and engineering licenses.
Background check orchestration within Salesforce (Sterling, Checkr, HireRight).
Reference check automation — structured reference questionnaires via email with structured data return.

All external verification calls are made via Named Credentials — ensuring credentials are stored securely in Salesforce and not embedded in code. The KT_VerificationOrchestrator.cls acts as the single entry point for all verification requests, routing to the appropriate provider based on domain and verification type.
Manual (HR) or auto on document upload
Triggered on UK employee domain selection
Triggered on US employee I-9 form completion
Auto-triggered based on domain compliance rules
Master verification record per check — status, provider, reference ID, result, expiry date
Detailed result data from provider — parsed and stored as structured fields, raw JSON in Long Text
Pending → Submitted → In_Progress → Passed / Failed / Manual_Review_Required → Expired
KT Compliance Auditor agent monitors verification status and proactively alerts HR on failures or approaching expiry
Verification status streamed to unified onboardee profile for compliance scoring

The Multi-Framework Compliance Engine is an intelligent rules-based system that automatically identifies compliance requirements for each onboardee based on their domain, persona, role, and location — then auto-assigns, tracks, and reports on compliance tasks throughout the onboarding lifecycle.
Regulatory framework library: HIPAA, OSHA, SOX, GDPR, FDA 21 CFR Part 11, ISO 9001, ISO 45001 — fully pre-configured.
"If-this-then-that" rule engine: evaluates onboarding context and auto-assigns specific compliance tasks.
Real-time compliance score dashboard per onboardee — executives see portfolio-level compliance coverage.
Regulatory reporting on demand — generate audit-ready compliance reports for any regulatory body.
Agentforce KT Compliance Auditor provides natural language compliance gap analysis on demand.
Privacy training, PHI access agreement, minimum necessary training, breach notification procedure
Hazard communication training, PPE assignment, emergency procedure training, MSDS acknowledgment
Code of conduct, conflict of interest disclosure, whistleblower policy, financial controls training
Data protection training, privacy notice acknowledgment, data subject rights training, DPA agreement
Electronic records training, audit trail awareness, password policy acknowledgment, validation documentation
Quality management training, process documentation review, corrective action procedure
OH&S policy training, hazard identification, incident reporting procedure, risk assessment

Compliance rules are stored as Custom Metadata (KT_Compliance_Rule__mdt) and evaluated at runtime by KT_ComplianceEngine.cls. The engine uses a forward-chaining rule evaluation pattern — each rule's trigger condition is evaluated against the onboarding context, and matched rules fire task/document creation actions.
Salesforce formula-style expression evaluated against KT_Onboarding__c fields (e.g., "Domain__c = 'Healthcare' AND Location_Country__c = 'US'" )
Create Task, Assign Training, Request Document, Block Stage Progression, Notify Compliance Officer
HIPAA / OSHA / SOX / GDPR / FDA / ISO 9001 / ISO 45001 / Custom
Number of days from Day 1 by which this compliance item must be completed
Mandatory (blocks journey progression) / Advisory (warning only) / Informational
Built on CRM Analytics (Tableau CRM), the compliance dashboard provides real-time visibility:
Per-onboardee compliance score (0–100%) based on completion of mandatory compliance tasks.
Department and regional compliance coverage heatmaps.
Regulatory framework drill-down — click HIPAA to see all onboardees with outstanding HIPAA items.
Audit-ready export — PDF/Excel compliance report per onboardee, time-stamped and digitally certified.

The Onboardee Portal is a branded, self-service digital experience that gives new hires, contractors, vendors, and other onboardees direct access to their onboarding journey — without requiring a Salesforce license. Built on Salesforce Experience Cloud with a Progressive Web App (PWA) layer, the portal delivers a native app-like experience on any device.
No Salesforce license required for onboardees — accessed via Experience Cloud guest/authenticated user.
Fully branded with company logo, colors, and welcome messaging per employer.
Mobile-responsive PWA — installable on iOS/Android home screen for offline-capable access.
Personalized task checklist with real-time completion status and progress bar.
Secure document upload with file type/size validation and virus scanning.
Video welcome message from the hiring manager embedded in the welcome page.
In-portal AI chat powered by Agentforce KT Onboardee Guide.
Notification engine: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Slack — configurable per onboardee preference.
Lightning Web Runtime for high-performance page delivery
Email-based OTP for passwordless access; SSO via Okta/Azure AD for employee portals
Welcome dashboard with manager video, checklist summary, and next action CTA
Full task checklist with real-time status updates via wire adapters
Drag-and-drop file upload with real-time validation and virus scan integration
KT Onboardee Guide agent embedded in portal sidebar — answers questions, guides tasks
Manages notification preferences and tracks delivery status per channel
Service worker caching, home screen install prompt, offline task viewing

The KT Notification Engine supports multi-channel delivery configured per onboardee preference. All notifications are triggered by Salesforce Flow and dispatched via the appropriate channel integration.
Welcome email, document reminders, stage completion confirmations, Esign requests
Day-before reminders, urgent document requests, background check status updates
Onboarding progress updates, friendly reminders, chatbot conversations
Team introductions, IT provisioning updates, buddy program messages
In-portal alerts for pending tasks, new documents requiring signature

The IT and Equipment Provisioning module automates the end-to-end setup of systems access, hardware allocation, and software licensing for new onboardees — eliminating the manual back-and-forth between HR and IT departments that commonly delays Day 1 readiness.
Equipment request form integrated into the onboarding journey — HR/manager selects hardware from catalog.
IT provisioning checklist: Active Directory, email account, VPN, software licenses, physical badge.
Native ServiceNow and Jira Service Management integration via Salesforce Flow.
Asset assignment tracking — every device, license, and access credential linked to the onboardee record.
Software license auto-assignment based on role templates — configurable per domain and job function.
HR/manager submits IT requirements via ktITProvisioningForm LWC (triggered from Journey Stage)
System auto-populates standard equipment and access list based on KT_Role_Template__mdt
ServiceNow/Jira ticket created via OmniStudio Integration Procedure with asset details
Each provisioned item tracked as KT_Asset_Assignment__c linked to onboarding record
IT completion event received via inbound webhook, updates journey task status
Agentforce KT HR Copilot notified when all IT items are provisioned — alerts manager
OmniStudio Integration Procedure calls ServiceNow Table API (Named Credential: KT_ServiceNow_NC) to create, update, and close incidents/requests.
REST API integration via KT_Jira_NC Named Credential — creates JSM issues with custom field mapping defined in KT_ITSM_FieldMapping__mdt.
Microsoft Graph API integration via KT_MicrosoftGraph_NC — account creation, group assignment, license assignment.
Role-based license templates in KT_Role_Template__mdt define required software; assignments tracked in KT_License_Assignment__c.

KT Onboarding's Training and Learning Management module provides a built-in micro-learning experience for onboarding-specific training — while also integrating with enterprise LMS platforms for organizations with existing learning infrastructure. This dual approach ensures organizations can go live immediately with native training content while preserving their LMS investments.
Built-in micro-learning builder: videos, quizzes, PDFs — all created within Salesforce.
Mandatory training assignment by domain and role — auto-assigned via DIE and Compliance Engine.
Training completion tracking with pass/fail scoring and certificate generation.
LMS integrations: Workday Learning, Cornerstone OnDemand, SAP SuccessFactors Learning.
Certification management with expiry tracking and renewal automation.
Training analytics dashboard — completion rates, average scores, time-spent, bottleneck courses.
Course definition — title, domain, persona applicability, passing score, certificate template
Individual learning module — type (Video/Quiz/PDF), content reference, duration, order
Links onboardee to course — tracks status, score, completion date, certificate issued
Renders video (Salesforce Files or external URL), PDF viewer, quiz engine
Multi-choice, true/false, scenario-based questions — randomizable, time-limited
Auto-generates PDF certificate on passing score using Document Management module (B4)
For organizations using enterprise LMS platforms, KT Onboarding synchronizes training assignments and completion data bi-directionally via SCORM/xAPI connectors and REST API integrations.
Bi-directional — assign from KT, receive completions from Workday
Bi-directional — push new hire, pull transcript
Receive completion statements from any SCORM-compliant LMS

KT Onboarding's Reporting and Analytics module provides real-time, actionable intelligence on every dimension of the onboarding program — from individual onboardee progress to enterprise-wide compliance coverage and cost analysis. Built on Salesforce CRM Analytics (formerly Einstein Analytics / Tableau CRM) and enhanced with Einstein Discovery predictions, this module transforms onboarding data into strategic HR intelligence.
Real-time CRM Analytics dashboards — no batch refresh cycles; live data as actions are completed.
Time-to-onboard tracking across departments, regions, domains, and persona types.
Bottleneck analysis — identify which tasks, stages, or departments consistently cause delays.
CSAT trending — automated satisfaction surveys at Day 30 and Day 90, trended over time.
Compliance coverage heatmap — visual representation of compliance gaps by department and regulation.
Cost-per-onboard metrics — HR time, vendor costs, license costs per onboardee.
Cohort analysis — compare onboarding class performance across intake periods.
Scheduled report delivery — auto-email dashboards to stakeholders on a configurable schedule.
Active onboardees, on-track vs. at-risk, average time-to-onboard, completion rate, open blockers
Stage completion rates, SLA breach frequency, bottleneck stages, task owner performance
Framework compliance scores, expiring certifications, overdue compliance tasks, audit readiness score
CSAT scores by cohort, NPS trend, qualitative feedback themes (AI-summarized by Einstein)
Equipment request fulfilment rate, average provisioning time, pending ITSM tickets by priority
Course completion rates, assessment scores, time-to-certify, mandatory training gap
Cost-per-onboard by domain/department, HR hours saved vs. baseline, ROI calculation
Condensed KPI card view — Time-to-Onboard, Compliance Rate, CSAT, Cost, Productivity Day

By connecting CRM Analytics to Data Cloud, KT Onboarding can leverage Einstein Discovery to predict onboarding outcomes: likelihood of early attrition, predicted time-to-productivity, and compliance risk score — enabling proactive HR interventions before problems materialize.
Early Attrition Risk — predicts likelihood of new hire leaving within 90 days based on onboarding engagement signals
Time-to-Onboard Forecast — predicts actual vs. planned completion date based on current task velocity
Compliance Risk Score — identifies onboardees at risk of non-compliance based on task completion patterns
Data Cloud unified profiles stream real-time signals to CRM Analytics datasets — no overnight batch required
Einstein Discovery models retrain weekly on new onboarding outcome data

KT Onboarding Enterprise provides a comprehensive integration layer connecting with every major HR system, payroll provider, background check service, identity verification platform, and enterprise IT tool. All integrations are built using Salesforce Named Credentials, OmniStudio Integration Procedures, and MuleSoft-compatible REST APIs — ensuring security, maintainability, and scalability.
Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, BambooHR, ADP Workforce Now
Bi-directional REST API — new hire data in, onboarding status out; Data Cloud streaming for real-time sync
One-way push on payroll enrollment completion — bank details, tax info, benefits elections
Request/callback pattern — KT sends candidate data, receives pass/fail webhook callback
Redirect flow for biometric capture; result delivered via webhook to KT_VerificationOrchestrator.cls
Envelope creation API, status webhooks, completed document retrieval
Okta, Microsoft Azure AD / Entra ID
SAML 2.0 / OpenID Connect for portal authentication; SCIM for user provisioning
REST API ticket creation/update via OmniStudio Integration Procedures
Workday Learning, Cornerstone, SAP SuccessFactors LMS
Assignment push, completion pull via REST / OData APIs
Outbound notification dispatch via Messaging Channels and Named Credentials

KT Onboarding exposes a documented REST API for customer-built integrations and third-party systems that are not covered by pre-built connectors. The API follows Salesforce REST conventions and is protected by Connected App OAuth 2.0.
List or create onboarding records — returns journey status, task completion percentages
Get or update a specific onboarding record — update stage, status, custom fields
List tasks for an onboarding; update task status (complete, defer, reassign)
List documents in vault; upload new document programmatically
Trigger a verification check (ID, background, right-to-work) — returns verification ID
Poll verification result — returns status and structured result data
Get compliance score and outstanding items for an onboarding record
Register or remove webhook endpoints for real-time event notifications

KT Onboarding is distributed as an AppExchange managed package using a per-onboardee subscription model. The Apex License Management Application (LMA) enforces usage limits, manages subscription upgrades/downgrades, and enables add-on module activation. Five tiers provide entry points for organizations of all sizes.
Core journey (3 stages), Smart Forms (5), Basic compliance, Email notifications only
Free + Journey Builder, 50+ templates, SMS notifications, Training LMS, Basic analytics
Starter + Smart Form Builder, Document CLM, KT Sign, All 8 domains, Advanced analytics, API access
Professional + Data Cloud integration, Agentforce agents, Multi-framework compliance, OCR, Bulk send, SSO
Enterprise + Custom domains, Dedicated support, SLA guarantee, White-label portal, Custom AI model fine-tuning
DocuSign e-signature instead of/in addition to KT Sign — for orgs with existing DocuSign agreements
Background check API credit bundle — consumed per verification request regardless of tier
AI-powered onboarding simulation — scenario-based training for high-risk roles (Healthcare, Manufacturing)
Agentforce sandbox for building bespoke onboarding agents with custom actions and prompts
Salesforce AppExchange LMA tracks active subscriber orgs, license counts, and subscription tier in the ISV org.
Apex class queried on every onboarding record creation — checks onboardee count against tier limit. Raises LimitException if exceeded with upgrade prompt.
Custom Metadata (KT_Feature_Gate__mdt) maps features to tier requirements. Checked in Apex service classes and LWC via @wire callout.
KT_Usage_Event__e Platform Events published on onboardee creation — aggregated in ISV org CRM Analytics for billing reconciliation.
In-app upgrade prompt links to Salesforce checkout flow via AppExchange upgrade API.

Persona types define the onboarding journey template, compliance profile, document checklist, portal experience, and notification preferences for each category of onboardee. All personas are configured via Custom Metadata and can be customized by admins without code changes. Composite personas (e.g., a Contractor in Healthcare domain) are fully supported by combining base persona templates.
Right-to-work, background check, mandatory training, payroll enrollment
IR35/1099 status, SOW review, limited system access, no benefits
Insurance COI, banking verification, procurement approval, NDA
HIPAA consent, insurance verification, privacy notice
SLA agreement, NDA, privacy notice, data processing agreement
DBS check (UK), FERPA (US), safeguarding training, course enrollment
Franchise agreement, territory NDA, brand guidelines, POS training
Custom Metadata defining persona — code, display name, journey template reference, compliance profile, portal config
Per-persona task overrides — adds or removes tasks from the base domain template
Per-persona document requirements — adds or removes document requests from domain default
Supported via persona inheritance chain — base persona + domain overlay evaluated by DIE at instantiation time
Admins create new KT_Persona__mdt records in Setup. Available immediately in the Persona Type picklist on KT_Onboarding__c.
Applied to all PII fields on KT_Onboarding__c, KT_Verification__c, KT_FormSubmission__c — encrypted at rest using customer-managed keys (BYOK option in Ultra tier).
Tracks changes to sensitive fields (verification status, compliance score, salary) with 10-year retention for regulated industries.
All API access, report exports, and portal logins logged via Event Monitoring for security audits.
All Agentforce AI operations pass through Einstein Trust Layer — PII masking, zero data retention by LLM providers, audit log of every AI interaction.
Salesforce Hyperforce allows selection of data residency region (US, EU, APAC, AU) — critical for GDPR and data sovereignty compliance.
Full CRUD on all KT objects, manage journey templates, configure domains, access all analytics
Create/edit onboarding records, view documents, manage tasks, run reports
View all compliance records, generate audit reports, manage compliance rules (read-only metadata)
View/update IT provisioning tasks, asset assignments, ITSM ticket status
View own team onboardees, approve tasks, view training progress
View own onboarding record, submit forms, upload documents, complete training
KT Onboarding has been designed to pass Salesforce Security Review for AppExchange listing. Key compliance areas:
No use of unsafe APIs — all SOQL is parameterized to prevent SOQL injection.
All Named Credentials used for external callouts — no credentials hardcoded in Apex.
Apex sharing enforced via WITH SHARING on all query methods.
CSRF protection on all LWC forms via Salesforce framework built-ins.
XSS prevention via LWC template auto-escaping — no dangerouslySetInnerHTML equivalents.
Scanner-clean code — passed Salesforce CLI Scanner (PMD + RetireJS) with zero critical findings.

KT Onboarding is distributed as a Salesforce 2nd Generation Managed Package (2GP). The package is built using Salesforce DX with scratch org development, automated CI/CD via GitHub Actions, and packaging via the Salesforce CLI.
Domain, persona, task template, compliance rule, feature gate configurations
All UI components including Journey Builder, Form Builder, Analytics dashboards
Service classes, batch jobs, triggers, queueable jobs
Object triggers for onboarding, task, document, verification, compliance objects
Automation flows for compliance triggers, notifications, SLA escalation
Guided HR and onboardee data entry flows
Journey stage orchestration templates per persona type
OmniScripts, DataRaptors, Integration Procedures for integrations
All translatable labels for 50+ language support
LWC assets, PWA manifest, loading animations
Install managed package from AppExchange into Salesforce org (Sandbox first recommended)
Apex post-install script creates initial Permission Sets, activates default Custom Metadata, and deploys Experience Cloud site
Admin selects active domains and personas in KT Setup Assistant
Configure Named Credentials for HRIS, background check, ID verification, notification channels
Upload company logo, set color scheme, configure welcome message and manager video
Assign KT Permission Sets to HR team, IT, compliance, and managers
Create first test onboarding record — DIE auto-generates full journey

As a managed package, KT Onboarding upgrades are delivered via AppExchange. Custom Metadata configurations made by subscriber org admins are preserved across upgrades. Apex and LWC components are replaced with new versions, but the managed package namespace protects against conflicts with subscriber org customizations.
< 3 seconds from record create to full journey/tasks created
Apex CPU time log in Event Monitoring
< 2 seconds on desktop, < 3 seconds on mobile (4G)
< 5 seconds for single document, < 60 min for 1,000 bulk documents via batch
< 2 seconds for cached content (offline); < 3 seconds on first load
Batch Apex with Queueable chaining supports 10,000+ simultaneous onboarding records without hitting governor limits.
Experience Cloud portal scales with Salesforce infrastructure — tested at 5,000 concurrent portal sessions.
Big Objects used for audit logs and compliance event history — preserves standard object query performance at multi-million record volumes.
2GP package supports deployment to unlimited subscriber orgs — each org is fully isolated.
Fully compatible with Salesforce Hyperforce for global, elastic scaling.
Manual verification fallback — HR notified to verify manually
Order queued and retried automatically when API recovers (Platform Events)
In-portal alert created as fallback if notification channel is unavailable
Manual document review task created for HR if OCR fails after 3 retries
GDPR: Right to Erasure implemented via Data Cloud purge rules + Salesforce Field Audit Trail deletion — documented in Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA) provided on request.
HIPAA: BAA available for Healthcare tier customers. PHI fields encrypted with Shield. Audit logging on all PHI access via Event Monitoring.
SOC 2 Type II: Salesforce platform is SOC 2 Type II certified. KT Onboarding code follows all controls required for customer SOC 2 compliance programs.
ISO 27001: Integration and data handling procedures documented and aligned to ISO 27001 control requirements.
Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for portal and admin components. Screen reader tested with JAWS and NVDA.
Salesforce AI agent platform powering autonomous onboarding automation within KT Onboarding.
Salesforce real-time data platform that unifies onboardee data across HRIS, Salesforce, and external systems.
Domain Intelligence Engine — the metadata-driven core of KT Onboarding that auto-configures journeys by domain and persona.
Salesforce declarative automation tool for multi-step, multi-user business process orchestration.
License Management Application — Salesforce AppExchange tool for managing subscriber licensing.
Lightning Web Component — Salesforce modern web component framework used for all KT UI components.
Salesforce secure credential store for external API authentication — used for all KT integration endpoints.
Salesforce declarative toolset (OmniScript, DataRaptor, Integration Procedure) for guided experiences and integrations.
Progressive Web Application — web app with native app behaviors (offline, installable) used for the onboardee portal.
Second-Generation Managed Package — modern Salesforce DX-based managed package format used for AppExchange distribution.
KT Onboarding Enterprise Design Specification v1.0 (March 2026) — Source requirements document
KT Onboarding API Reference (Swagger/OpenAPI 3.0) — detailed API endpoint documentation
KT Onboarding AppExchange Security Review Submission — security attestation and pen test results
KT Onboarding Data Dictionary — complete field-level documentation for all 28 custom objects
KT Onboarding Privacy Impact Assessment — GDPR and HIPAA compliance documentation
Minimum required org edition: Enterprise or above
Requires Einstein AI Add-on or Agentforce for Service license
Requires Data Cloud license (Starter or above)
Included in Salesforce Platform — no separate license required
Requires CRM Analytics Growth or Plus license
Requires Experience Cloud login or member license for portal users
